description: Onboard the Zephyr One, Nathaniel Malick relishes their isolation above Earth as he instructs his crew and sends a signal. Deke makes a quip referencing Nakatomi Plaza, while Nathaniel assures Kimball that S.H.I.E.L.D. can't reach them. The atmosphere is tense and villainous, establishing the antagonists' removal from Earth and furthering their plans.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: 50,000 miles above Earth and rising, sir.
Should be a killer view. And lay off the “sir.” We're trying to make it so no one has to call anyone “sir” ever again. Send the signal.
Not at this range. We're all alone up here.
